total_attempts_note: response is a 500-error payload {reason, kind}; no total_attempts field surfaced. cmd_generate must have run multiple internal turns (110s wall is consistent with 3-7 LLM calls to SiliconFlow) but the API does not expose an attempts counter on the error path.

transcript_excerpt: (response is error JSON; no transcript_excerpt field present. Error payload reason text: 'missing_playfield: 找不到游戏面板 — 期望 <canvas>、CSS grid (display: grid + grid-template-* + repeat())、<svg>、<table>、或 cell-class 网格之一; missing_keyboard_handler: 找不到 addEventListener('keydown' / 'keyup' / 'keypress') — 无法接收键盘输入; missing_animation_loop: 找不到 requestAnimationFrame 或 setInterval — 游戏循环不会启动; keydown_not_on_document_or_window: 键盘监听只挂在 body 上 — iframe sandbox 中 body 可能无焦点，请挂到 document 或 window | last_artifact=pi4_p7_traditional_1779150050/artifacts/index.html'
narrative: Step 2 PARTIAL. End-to-end pipeline IS wired: HTTP request reaches cmd_generate, SiliconFlow is called (110s wall-clock + intermediate artifact written), the LLM produces a syntactically valid HTML+CSS+JS artifact (5384 bytes, video-converter UI in Traditional Chinese matching the spec's '影片轉檔工具' goal), and the file lands on disk at the canonical artifacts path. The endpoint fails with HTTP 500 / kind=generate_quality_failed only because the post-generation quality predicates fire 4 game-shaped checks (playfield/keyboard/animation_loop/keydown-target) against an artifact that was never meant to be a game. This is a domain-mismatch problem in the predicate layer, not a pipeline failure: (a) the spec describes a video conversion tool with drag-drop upload, (b) the artifact correctly implements that domain (dropZone + fileInput + SHA256 + 模擬轉檔), (c) the quality gate hard-codes game heuristics and rejects any non-game output. Robustness verdict: cmd_generate tolerates the known D-NEW-3/F10 slot-mapping bugs in the Π4.3 spec.md well enough to produce a coherent on-domain artifact in one externalized cycle. The bottleneck for PI5 SMOKE-PASS is the universality of the quality classifier (it must route P7 to a non-game predicate set), which echoes the Π4.3 triage classifier as the dominant universality blocker.
